title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a hands-on Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. You'll build and scale the operational backbone of the GTM engine. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ is essential.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: senior RevOps profile aligns perfectly with Head of Revenue Operations mandate, Fintech/SaaS scaling experience directly applicable to $85M+ funded cloud cost management company, and Tel Aviv location is primary preference.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and thought of you immediately—a senior RevOps leader building the operational backbone for a well-funded SaaS company scaling through $30M+ ARR is exactly your wheelhouse. With your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM engines and deep Salesforce expertise, you'd be positioned to take their Tel Aviv HQ's revenue operations to the next level while managing globally distributed teams. Given your location flexibility around Tel Aviv, this feels like a natural next move.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. You'll partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, analyze performance and market data to inform segmentation, and maintain accurate territory mapping in tools like Fullcast and Salesforce. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills in Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and CRM proficiency. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and GTM optimization directly match his core competencies, though the role is slightly more specialized in territory modeling than broader revenue operations leadership.

Territory modeling and pipeline forecasting are areas where I've driven measurable impact, and I'm excited about the opportunity to help Gong optimize its go-to-market architecture at scale across global markets.

title: Revenue Operations (RevOps) Manager

You'll work directly with the CEO and GTM leadership to define key metrics, uncover opportunities, and shape strategic decisions. Requires 3+ years in RevOps or BizOps in early-stage startups and/or consulting, ideally in SaaS or health tech, a strong analytical and systems mindset, and experience building GTM systems and processes.

title: GTM Engineer

Curious if you need someone who can architect *which* workflows to automate first, or if you're locked on the pure builder side?
